image.title: NAL Hetherington, B Johnston, G Kotronoulas, F Finlay, P Keeley, A McKeown

item.title: COVID-19 and Hospital Palliative Care - A service evaluation exploring the symptoms and outcomes of 186 patients and the impact of the pandemic on specialist Hospital Palliative Care.
